ns0:entry.ns0:title: DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
Language: typescript
A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
Language: typescript
GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: badlogic/pi-mono
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono
Language: typescript
AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods

ns0:entry.ns0:title: clash-verge-rev/clash-verge-rev
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/clash-verge-rev/clash-verge-rev
Language: typescript
A modern GUI client based on Tauri, designed to run in Windows, macOS and Linux for tailored proxy experience

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudflare/agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudflare/agents
Language: typescript
Build and deploy AI Agents on Cloudflare

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dyad-sh/dyad
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dyad-sh/dyad
Language: typescript
Local, open-source AI app builder for power users ✨ v0 / Lovable / Replit / Bolt alternative 🌟 Star if you like it!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ghostfolio/ghostfolio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ghostfolio/ghostfolio
Language: typescript
Open Source Wealth Management Software. Angular + NestJS + Prisma + Nx + TypeScript 🤍

ns0:entry.ns0:title: refly-ai/refly
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/refly-ai/refly
Language: typescript
The first open-source agent skills builder. Define skills by vibe workflow, run on Claude Code, Cursor, Codex & more. Build Clawdbot 🦞· APIs for Lovable · Bots for Slack & Lark/Feishu · Skills are infrastructure, not prompts.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: simstudioai/sim
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/simstudioai/sim
Language: typescript
Build, deploy, and orchestrate AI agents. Sim is the central intelligence layer for your AI workforce.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tiann/hapi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tiann/hapi
Language: typescript
App for Claude Code / Codex / Gemini / OpenCode, vibe coding anytime, anywhere
